challenges.description: Multiple systems failing - choose repair priority order
challenges.optimal_order: power_grid > life_support > isru > water_recycler > thermal > greenhouse

system_dependencies.description: v10 implements real system interdependencies based on ISS ECLSS
data_sources: ISS Environmental Control and Life Support System (ECLSS)
NASA FMEA database for space systems
ISS maintenance logs and failure reports

physics_constants.system_interdependency: Binary dependency graph with severity multipliers
physics_constants.repair_complexity: Scales with number of affected systems
